threats.scenario: Product search builds raw SQL via template literals. An unauthenticated attacker can craft a UNION-based payload in the `q` parameter to extract the full user table, including bcrypt hashes.
threats.mitigation_title: Parameterize SQL queries with Sequelize replacements

steps: Replace raw query in routes/search.ts with Sequelize.findAll({ where: ... })
Add integration test with sqlmap payload

threats.scenario: Login endpoint concatenates email/password into an SQL string. The `--` comment sequence bypasses the password check entirely, enabling full account takeover for any known email.

steps: Replace raw query in routes/login.ts with parameterized Sequelize lookup
Add unit test covering `' OR 1=1 --` payload
